title: Jordi
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Jordi''''' group was a pair of [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When the Alliance succeeded in stranding the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Priam (starship)|''Priam'']] near [[Kalla VII]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] gave the order for a "board and capture" operation against the ''Priam''.

A strike by [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] disabled the ship and transports from [[Assault (transports)|''Assault'']] group delivered commandos from [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] to capture the vessel. Once captured, [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class shuttles]] from [[Panda (transports)|''Panda'']] group delivered the new crew for the ship while ''Jordi 1'' delivered supplies and ''Jordi 2'' brought equipment needed to secure and operate the ship. Once all the transports were aboard, the Rebel forces, along with the newly captured frigate, jumped to hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]

*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
